testcase.name: test_specialist_cannot_access_admin

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='phased-document.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/login (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='phased-document.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xfa86ab5c5750>, 'Connection to phased-document.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=15)'))

testcase.failure:
